name: Elizabeth
subject: What I'm doing for Team MJ

body:

| | Hi Peter,

I'm Elizabeth, Director of Operations for Team MJ. Whether it's planning statewide travel, helping balance the budget, or helping to move our entire organization online while we work from home, my most important role is to keep our operation on track.

Balancing the budget takes a steady stream of online donations, and in the current environment, our fundraising has taken a hit. **I can't keep us on track to beat Sen. Cornyn without your support.[If you're able, will you pitch in whatever you can right now to help us get back on track?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890318/7f51f7bc/4f3f169d/4ef170c6/3339105982/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200426.3nd__1297__&amount=10")**

In my role, I get to see firsthand how hard _everyone_ on our team is working to beat Sen. Cornyn and send an ass-kicker to fight for us in the Senate. It's going to take everything we've got to elect MJ, and this team is ready to do it.

**If you're ready to show Sen. Cornyn the door, please donate what you can today!** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890318/7f51f7bc/4f3f169d/4ef170c5/3339105982/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200426.3nd__1297__&amount=5")**

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890318/7f51f7bc/4f3f169d/4ef1713b/3339105982/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200426.3nd__1297__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890318/7f51f7bc/4f3f169d/4ef1713a/3339105982/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200426.3nd__1297__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890318/7f51f7bc/4f3f169d/4ef17139/3339105982/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200426.3nd__1297__")**
MJ isn't taking any money from corporate PACs, so she's relying on grassroots power from you, just like she relies on logistics from me, to keep this campaign operating at full speed.

We can't do this without you!

Elizabeth Ahrens
Operations Director

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890318/7f51f7bc/4f3f169d/4ef170c6/3339105982/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200426.3nd__1297__&amount=10")**

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890318/7f51f7bc/4f3f169d/4ef17138/3339105982/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1297&amount=10")**

We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Pete-Buttigieg-Update@christyforcongress.org
subject: FW: The special election on May 12th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Did you see this email from Pete Buttigieg? He's right -- our airwaves are getting flooded by ads from special interests trying to keep Christy out of Congress.

**[Can you join Mayor Pete and chip in $5 or more right now before this bellwether special election in just a few short weeks?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb55/29776869/a5a8b7d/569f6f57/2508146070/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjZfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZ2tpY2tlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200426_petebuttigiegkicker-full")** [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb55/29776869/a5a8b7d/569f6f57/2508146070/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjZfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZ2tpY2tlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200426_petebuttigiegkicker-full") -Team Christy

\---------------------------Forwarded message---------------------------
From: Pete Buttigieg
Send date: Friday, April 24 at 11:51 a.m.
Subject: The special election on May 12th

Friend,

This November is going to be the most important election in our lifetimes. It's about moving forward versus staying trapped in chaos, and it's an opportunity to adjust our country's moral compass.

But there is another important election coming up even sooner.

Democrats are fortunate to have Christy Smith running in the special election for California's 25th House district.

This is the first Toss-Up congressional election in the wake of this global crisis, and it is crucial that Christy Smith is elected on May 12th. We need leaders like her in Congress making the important decisions about how we recover from this pandemic.

Special elections get a lot of attention, and special interest groups have pledged to put a lot of money into this race to help Christy's opponent. We need you to step up today to make sure we send Christy to Congress.

**[So I'm asking you today to join me in supporting Christy Smith. Can you make a contribution of $5 or any amount you can to her campaign?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb55/29776869/a5a8b7d/569f6f57/2508146070/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjZfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZ2tpY2tlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200426_petebuttigiegkicker-full")**

This race will be a bellwether: If we win, it will show that the country is ready for new leadership; ready for a government that respects each and every one of us; ready to be led with dignity, especially during times of crisis.

We need adults at the table making the decisions. Leaders who will cut through hyper-partisan rhetoric, put their heads down, and get to work to help people get through this unprecedented crisis.

Christy will be that leader -- but **right now Republicans are spending $1 million on TV ads to stop Christy from getting there.** And now the race is officially a "Toss-Up" by Cook Political Report, Politico, and Larry Sabato's Crystal Ball.

**[I'm ready to see people like Christy in Congress -- can you chip in today to make sure she's in this fight with us?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb55/29776869/a5a8b7d/569f6f57/2508146070/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjZfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZ2tpY2tlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200426_petebuttigiegkicker-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb55/29776869/a5a8b7d/569f6f50/2508146070/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjZfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZ2tpY2tlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200426_petebuttigiegkicker-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb55/29776869/a5a8b7d/569f6f51/2508146070/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjZfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZ2tpY2tlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200426_petebuttigiegkicker-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb55/29776869/a5a8b7d/569f6f52/2508146070/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjZfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZ2tpY2tlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200426_petebuttigiegkicker-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb55/29776869/a5a8b7d/569f6f53/2508146070/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjZfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZ2tpY2tlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200426_petebuttigiegkicker-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb55/29776869/a5a8b7d/569f6f2c/2508146070/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjZfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZ2tpY2tlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200426_petebuttigiegkicker-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb55/29776869/a5a8b7d/569f6f57/2508146070/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjZfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZ2tpY2tlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200426_petebuttigiegkicker-full")
Thanks so much,

Pete Buttigieg
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb55/29776869/a5a8b7d/569f6f57/2508146070/VEsHBA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjZfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZ2tpY2tlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200426_petebuttigiegkicker-full")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|
This email was sent by **[Christy Smith](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb55/29776869/a5a8b7d/569f6f2d/2508146070/VEsHBw/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")**
777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb55/29776869/a5a8b7d/569f6f2e/2508146070/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb55/29776869/a5a8b7d/569f6f2f/2508146070/VEsHAQ/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Our healthcare system is broken. Let’s demand something better.
body:
Peter,

As of this week, a total of 26 million Americans have filed for unemployment since the start of the COVID-19 outbreak. That alone should be proof that tying health insurance to employment is a terrible idea. But if you needed more reasons to doubt the efficacy of America’s patchwork healthcare system, consider this:

Our healthcare system is the most expensive in the world, yet we have fewer hospital beds, doctors, and nurses per capita than most other developed nations.

Elective surgeries are a main source of revenue for hospitals, but now that these procedures have been canceled as a result of COVID-19, hospitals are laying off their staff to stay financially solvent, and many rural hospitals may be forced to close altogether.

Pharmaceutical companies are racing to produce a coronavirus vaccine, and there’s nothing stopping them from setting prices well beyond the reach of most patients in order to turn a massive profit.

This pandemic has already left its mark on our healthcare system. The only question is, will we ignore all of the deficiencies, inequities, and the flaws that COVID-19 has brought to light, or will we learn from them and demand something better? I know what I’m fighting for: Will you add your name today and join me by supporting Medicare for All? actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-if-you-agree-we-need-congress-to-pass-medicare-for-all-now-more-than-ever?source=20200326_MedicareForAll_AB&referrer=group-adem-bunkeddeko-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fabm4a

Best,
Adem

body:
Our entire campaign has shifted online with the spread of coronavirus. Can you help today? Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5b5a9af8fcee2334/c4de27ed302268a0c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, There is no doubt that we are living in unprecedented times. With the spread of COVID-19, and “stay at home” orders across the nation, we have had to rethink the way we go about campaigning. I normally love in-person events. It’s an honor to shake the hands of the people who voted to put me in office, and hear their stories. Obviously and unfortunately, that just isn’t possible right now. Elections are still happening though, and I need your help to keep Oklahoma RED. Our campaign operations are fully digital now, and we’re relying on your support to reach as many people as we can online. **[Will you donate $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or what you can to help us get out the vote online today?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5b5a9af8fcee2334/a0e09d2f3ac7f111c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** I’m not a career politician, and I didn’t go to Washington in 2018 as a power move. I want to serve the good people of Oklahoma in my district, and all Americans, by standing with President Trump and his Make America Great Again agenda. Too many liberal Democrats have shown their true colors in Congress lately, teaming up against legislation to provide much-needed relief to small businesses. We’re in the middle of a public health pandemic, yet folks like Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are blocking additional funds to the Paycheck Protection Program. **[We cannot let these people stay in power. Will you make a secure, online donation today to help us flip the House?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5b5a9af8fcee2334/658ce3e89f8852a8c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** I know these are trying times for all of us, so please take care of yourself and your loved ones first and foremost, and only give if you are able to do so. If you are, please know that your support matters more than ever, as we strive to reach as many people as possible online. We have more work than ever to do to stay safe and start getting our country back to work. I’m looking forward to representing you for another term in Congress, but I need your help to get there. Please, if you’re able, take a moment to contribute what you can by**[clicking HERE](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5b5a9af8fcee2334/d62c94be07554686c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**. Every dollar matters in this fight. Thanks for your support, Congressman Kevin Hern [**Donate NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5b5a9af8fcee2334/b715043b037fe0b1c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5b5a9af8fcee2334/e506572458b4c949c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5b5a9af8fcee2334/7d17b6ed2287e51dc3d6b838967d376c/34143)

name: Betsy Rader
subject: Great news from EMILY's List!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
---
Dear Peter, During difficult times, a good support network makes all the difference. The emails, letters and donations that I receive from so many of you really lift my spirits and help to keep up the fight to make sure everyone is represented in our state government.
And now I'm thrilled to announce: **EMILY 's List, the country's _biggest_ resource for women in politics, just endorsed me!**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/lJ5yp_vHKqITwSzh2uEEZrbEfR_tcb0sRJW7sKm1Kfc=/dbyoUsG0O4cc1en9E6DWKC9eWBdL-a2ez72If3vQweQ=?refcode=emilyslist1) EMILY's List works to ensure that women have the resources not only to run for office, but to win! **This endorsement is a sign that folks across the country know this is a race we can, and must, win.** Women's reproductive rights and LGBTQ rights in Ohio are particularly on the line in this race since my opponent has taken aggressive public stances against these rights and has pledged to fight against these rights in the State Senate. The stakes in Ohio's elections have never been higher, and this endorsement is an important step on the road to election. __**Will you help keep up the momentum with a $25 contribution today?**__
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/lJ5yp_vHKqITwSzh2uEEZrbEfR_tcb0sRJW7sKm1Kfc=/dbyoUsG0O4cc1en9E6DWKC9eWBdL-a2ez72If3vQweQ=?refcode=emilyslist1&express_lane=true&amount=25)
I hope you'll join EMILY's List in supporting our campaign! Another way you can help me is to make sure your friends and neighbors are connected and staying informed. __Please share ____this great news by forwarding this e-mail to 5 friends who want to see more women leaders in the Statehouse.__ _**Thank you!**_
Sincerely,
_P.S. Remember -- Ohio absentee ballots must be postmarked TODAY! (April 27)_
---
Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
---
Friends of Betsy Rader
PO Box 280
Novelty OH 44072 United States

name: Charles Booker
subject: Have you seen our new campaign video?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
We released our new campaign video last night and there’s been an incredible response online. It’s clear that there’s a lot of people who are hungry for real change, who are sick and tired of being used as pawns in Mitch’s political games.
#
Have you seen our new campaign video?
**We released it last night and there’s been an incredible response online.**
It’s clear that there are a lot of people hungry for real change, who are sick and tired of being used as pawns in Mitch’s political games.
So many of you resonated with our message that this isn’t just a campaign to defeat another evil man in the Senate; this is a movement of people whose voices have not been heard and have been let down by politicians for too long.
**[Will you help us spread our video message so we can bring even more people into our movement to defeat Mitch McConnell? Please chip in $5 or anything you can, every dollar makes a big difference in a fight this important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17280081/189192629/-561426480?refcode=em20200428&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjAzZTg3OS1hODg4LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFS1kP81tXnoh-2XmCPvMmaxfBbd_BbV9wnpXfXXh-M=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17280082/189192657/-561426480?refcode=em20200428&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjAzZTg3OS1hODg4LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFS1kP81tXnoh-2XmCPvMmaxfBbd_BbV9wnpXfXXh-M=)
****[Watch our new video and chip in to the movement](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17280083/189192658/-561426480?refcode=em20200428&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjAzZTg3OS1hODg4LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFS1kP81tXnoh-2XmCPvMmaxfBbd_BbV9wnpXfXXh-M=)****
We were moved to see how many of you chipped in after watching. Teachers, plumbers, fast food workers, nurses, and more are excited to finally see a candidate who understands what it means to fight to make a living.
When we put together our $5, $10, or even $1 donations, the sum of that is something more powerful than any super PAC Mitch has.
**That is exactly what this campaign is all about.**
The only way we’re going to defeat Mitch McConnell and fight against the corrupt influences that dominate our politics is if we come together as people to fight for the change we believe in. I know after talking to thousands of people across this state that no matter where you were born or how you put dinner on the table, we all care about the same things — for our families to be safe, healthy, and secure.
That’s why we’re fighting to bring together folks from rural and urban areas, folks who are young and young at heart, folks from the hood to the holler, and from the Pike to the Purchase.
**This is the movement that’s going to change our politics forever.**
**[If we can share this video with even more people, we can grow the team that’s going to take down Mitch McConnell. Will you watch our new campaign video and then chip in $5 to help us share our video ad online?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17280097/189192753/-561426480?refcode=em20200428&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjAzZTg3OS1hODg4LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFS1kP81tXnoh-2XmCPvMmaxfBbd_BbV9wnpXfXXh-M=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17280098/189192754/-561426480?refcode=em20200428&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjAzZTg3OS1hODg4LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFS1kP81tXnoh-2XmCPvMmaxfBbd_BbV9wnpXfXXh-M=)****
Together,
Charles Booker

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: why we can't fall short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Friend, we are in the fight for the soul of our nation's democracy. It's a tough fight, but it's a fight we can win.
| | |
---
Friend: I'm about to ask you to make a donation to our campaign to help us hit our crucial end-of-month goal. **But first, let me tell you why this is so important - and what will happen if we fall short**.
Growing up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, my family didn't have much. But through hard work, determination and the support of my community, I earned a college degree - and later, became the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church.
Here's the hard truth: The opportunities that made my journey possible - from Kayton Homes to Dr. King's pulpit - are increasingly out of reach for far too many. I'm running for Senate because every Georgian deserves a seat at the table - but only with your support will we be able to make this a reality.
**That's why I'm personally asking you to chip in right now and help us hit our $50,000 goal before our critical midnight deadline. I 'm counting on you to come through, Friend: ****[Please, will you give $5 or more now, so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e70e/288179be/a723e4d/348e8f4c/2963654179/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTY5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk169-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e70e/288179be/a723e4d/348e8f4c/2963654179/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTY5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk169-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
The stakes are high, friend. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms that Democrats CAN flip the Senate - and analysts at _The Washington Post_ say that winning in Georgia is key to making this happen.
**But already, my wealthy Republican opponent has started spending _$20 MILLION of her own fortune_ against me - and you can bet that the GOP will flood Georgia with cash to stop our campaign in its tracks.**
We are in the fight for the soul of our nation's democracy. It's a tough fight - but it's a fight we can win. If we're going to take back the Senate from corrupt leaders like Mitch McConnell, we need to first win here in Georgia. But we can't get it done without support from grassroots folks like you.
**So, friend, with time running out before this crucial deadline, I have to ask: [Please, if you care about taking back the Senate for Democrats, will you give $5 - or even $10 - to help us hit our end-of-month goal, flip Georgia blue and restore moral leadership to our government?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e70e/288179be/a723e4d/348e8f4c/2963654179/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTY5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk169-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
I'm so grateful for your support - thank you.

Reverend Warnock
| [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e70e/288179be/a723e4d/348e8f4c/2963654179/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTY5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk169-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

But first, let me tell you why this is so important - and what will happen if we fall short. Growing up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, my family didn't have much. But through hard work, determination and the support of my community, I earned a college degree - and later, became the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Here's the hard truth: The opportunities that made my journey possible - from Kayton Homes to Dr. King's pulpit - are increasingly out of reach for far too many. I'm running for Senate because every Georgian deserves a seat at the table - but only with your support will we be able to make this a reality. If we're going to take back the Senate from corrupt leaders like Mitch McConnell, we need to first win here in Georgia. But we can't get it done without support from grassroots folks like you. name: MJ Hegar
subject: 💪 tough fights 💪
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I want to tell you why I decided to get into this race.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890312/7f51f7bc/4f31c346/4ef17134/886591366/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

I'm not what many might call an obvious choice for a Senate candidate, so I want to tell you why I decided to get into this campaign (**[If you're already with me, you can make a donation here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890312/7f51f7bc/4f31c346/4ef1712b/886591366/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyODMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200427.1nd__1283__&amount=10")**). | I'm not a career politician, and I know it's going to be TOUGH for an outside candidate to beat an eighteen-year incumbent senator who has spent his time in Washington currying favor with the DC establishment as Mitch McConnell's right-hand man -- instead of serving Texans. **But I 've taken on a lot of tough fights in my life, and that's why I know I can win this one.**

I decided to step up and run against Senator Cornyn because I believe I have what it takes to win. **[Will you pitch in now to help us take on Sen. Cornyn from the strongest position possible?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890312/7f51f7bc/4f31c346/4ef1712b/886591366/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyODMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200427.1nd__1283__&amount=10")** **[**MAKE A GRASSROOTS DONATION**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890312/7f51f7bc/4f31c346/4ef1712b/886591366/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyODMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200427.1nd__1283__&amount=10")**
---
Texas deserves better than a senator who votes to rip health care away from millions, blocked bills to lower prescription drug prices, and flat out refused to take action on gun violence.

I will fight for y'all in the Senate and be accountable to the _people_ only. As a combat veteran and working mom who has personally faced the struggles working Texans deal with every day, you can be sure of that.

**If you 're ready for a senator who will put you first, I need you to pitch in so we can take on Sen. Cornyn and his special interest allies:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890312/7f51f7bc/4f31c346/4ef1712a/886591366/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyODMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200427.1nd__1283__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890312/7f51f7bc/4f31c346/4ef17129/886591366/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyODMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200427.1nd__1283__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890312/7f51f7bc/4f31c346/4ef17128/886591366/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyODMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200427.1nd__1283__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890312/7f51f7bc/4f31c346/4ef1712f/886591366/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyODMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200427.1nd__1283__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890312/7f51f7bc/4f31c346/4ef1712e/886591366/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyODMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200427.1nd__1283__")**
Thanks for all that you do,

MJ Hegar

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890312/7f51f7bc/4f31c346/4ef1712b/886591366/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyODMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200427.1nd__1283__&amount=10")

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890312/7f51f7bc/4f31c346/4ef1712d/886591366/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyODMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1283&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890312/7f51f7bc/4f31c346/4ef1712c/886591366/VEsHBw/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

Round Rock, TX 78683

subject: We must SAVE the Postal Service!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | **BREAKING NEWS: Postmaster General says U.S. Postal Service will COLLAPSE without Emergency Funding** [**RAPID RESPONSE PETITION: Sign your name to SAVE the United States Postal Service ->**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04d5/72412298/4fa7def4/6104fc6d/521789209/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200426_Post_U1_X3?&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+RAPID+RESPONSE+PETITION+Sign+your+name+t&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200426_PostOffice_U1_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200426_PostOffice_U1_X3")
* * *
| **_WE. ARE. OUTRAGED._** | [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04d5/72412298/4fa7def4/6104fc6c/521789209/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200426_Post_U1_X3?&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200426_PostOffice_U1_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200426_PostOffice_U1_X3")
---
_The U.S. Postal Service needs $75 Billion in emergency funding or they 'll be forced to SHUT DOWN!_
But Trump just flat out REFUSED to help the Postal Service -- saying he would not sign a coronavirus aid package that sent any relief to USPS.
**We need all-hands-on-deck to fight back against this VICIOUS assault and SAVE the Post Office:**
| | [EMERGENCY PETITION: Save the Post Office ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04d5/72412298/4fa7def4/6104fc6f/521789209/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200426_Post_U1_X3?&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+EMERGENCY+PETITION+Save+the+Post+Office+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200426_PostOffice_U1_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200426_PostOffice_U1_X3")
---

**10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED**
_**Peter -- our hearts are PLUMMETING:**_
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04d5/72412298/4fa7def4/6104fc6e/521789209/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200426_Post_U1_X3?&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200426_PostOffice_U1_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200426_PostOffice_U1_X3")
---
Millions of Americans rely on the U.S. Postal Service for affordable, reliable mail delivery. The Postal Service is actually _required by law_ to deliver to every mailing address in the country, 6 days a week, rain or shine.
But Trump wants to RUIN the Postal Service and force them into BANKRUPTCY!
| [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04d5/72412298/4fa7def4/6104fc51/521789209/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200426_Post_U1_X3?&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200426_PostOffice_U1_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200426_PostOffice_U1_X3")
---
"Some lawmakers, postal union representatives and others who rely on the service now fear that **the Trump administration is trying to use the current crisis** to achieve conservatives' longstanding goal of nudging the mail service toward privatization...**by essentially forcing it into bankruptcy.** "
**Universal Vote By Mail, the Census...even online shopping...it ALL depends on the United States Postal Service.**
We need to show Trump the American people WILL NOT stand for this attack. So we need 10,000 Democrats to sign on and show their support:
| | [SIGN THE PETITION: Save the Postal Service ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04d5/72412298/4fa7def4/6104fc50/521789209/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200426_Post_U1_X3?&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+SIGN+THE+PETITION+Save+the+Postal+Servic&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200426_PostOffice_U1_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200426_PostOffice_U1_X3")
---
Thanks for speaking out, Peter. We couldn't do this without you!
_\--Voter Protection Project_

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04d5/72412298/4fa7def4/6104fc53/521789209/VEsB/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200426_PostOffice_U1_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200426_PostOffice_U1_X3")

OUTRAGED. | "" The U.S. Postal Service needs $75 Billion in emergency funding or they 'll be forced to SHUT DOWN! But Trump just flat out REFUSED to help the Postal Service -- saying he would not sign a coronavirus aid package that sent any relief to USPS. We need all-hands-on-deck to fight back against this VICIOUS assault and SAVE the Post Office: | | "" 10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED Peter -- our hearts are PLUMMETING: "" Millions of Americans rely on the U.S. Postal Service for affordable, reliable mail delivery. The Postal Service is actually required by law to deliver to every mailing address in the country, 6 days a week, rain or shine. But Trump wants to RUIN the Postal Service and force them into BANKRUPTCY! | "" "Some lawmakers, postal union representatives and others who rely on the service now fear that the Trump administration is trying to use the current crisis to achieve conservatives' longstanding goal of nudging the mail service toward privatization...by essentially forcing it into bankruptcy. " Universal Vote By Mail, the Census...even online shopping...it ALL depends on the United States Postal Service.** We need to show Trump the American people WILL NOT stand for this attack. subject: FW: for President Trump
body:
Friend, Wanted to follow up with you about my last email.
As I mentioned, I'm planning to send my fundraising numbers directly to President Trump after this month is over ¦ I want to send him some encouraging news ¦ to show him Texans have his back.
To do this, I instituted a FOUR TIMES MATCH to any donation to this email.
From where we stand now, I'm a little concerned that our numbers won't be as impressive as I hoped.
And I just heard that the 4X MATCH offer will expire in just a few hours ¦
**[I need you to take immediate action to help boost our numbers. It's very important to me that we show President Trump something he'd be impressed by.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zwqgm0-KgY-QZ7EDxLVnnQS5Par6tsEChJNHfLS0BfjrNOn9ZlhP0l5Ma3bOQjoDtQJxW3dcQv5ZzGik6tXVl5E0gzTA9P8OxWvTlO_CkrOoZam4dSJqHGZrJtVUitXYYrZ-ZFLdcKxFApuo972M3XQZyBZKyx98awxTXYLRDyo_BcAPgHRq8pB9s2_DFyhxoUrhZw07Uu433-R-0ISYtil8Iho_yLO1lT-YAWCy6AyzDaP4JTiaWWt_oL4uWkwGD0nh6S8mrBkwrrbT4-dOC9_zSqCh7M0Tj9jcBD-XtkhAWdxMvxzqx1MAPcsSWEZVXspmMHRajEEEk1iwhpT7wTSx6q-IxGjY&c=v_SXduq7-tepsJ4kQ79OVsfSSqIPyBcLQ8DyPHn3qdr6jR0v4IPuUw==&ch=aUw4OrhC0WnE_YHrlCqeb70FshA3OELY5h-R3hFlQWVFJDjq2HgnmQ==) **
Can you imagine promising the president of the United States that you'd send him good news, only to send along something sub-par?
[**Can I count on you to chip in now?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zwqgm0-KgY-QZ7EDxLVnnQS5Par6tsEChJNHfLS0BfjrNOn9ZlhP0l5Ma3bOQjoDtQJxW3dcQv5ZzGik6tXVl5E0gzTA9P8OxWvTlO_CkrOoZam4dSJqHGZrJtVUitXYYrZ-ZFLdcKxFApuo972M3XQZyBZKyx98awxTXYLRDyo_BcAPgHRq8pB9s2_DFyhxoUrhZw07Uu433-R-0ISYtil8Iho_yLO1lT-YAWCy6AyzDaP4JTiaWWt_oL4uWkwGD0nh6S8mrBkwrrbT4-dOC9_zSqCh7M0Tj9jcBD-XtkhAWdxMvxzqx1MAPcsSWEZVXspmMHRajEEEk1iwhpT7wal8hQGIUxfP&c=v_SXduq7-tepsJ4kQ79OVsfSSqIPyBcLQ8DyPHn3qdr6jR0v4IPuUw==&ch=aUw4OrhC0WnE_YHrlCqeb70FshA3OELY5h-R3hFlQWVFJDjq2HgnmQ==) **APRIL END OF MONTH DEADLINE** Quadruple Match: **ACTIVATED** [ **CONTRIBUTE **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zwqgm0-KgY-QZ7EDxLVnnQS5Par6tsEChJNHfLS0BfjrNOn9ZlhP0l5Ma3bOQjoDtQJxW3dcQv5ZzGik6tXVl5E0gzTA9P8OxWvTlO_CkrOoZam4dSJqHGZrJtVUitXYYrZ-ZFLdcKxFApuo972M3XQZyBZKyx98awxTXYLRDyo_BcAPgHRq8pB9s2_DFyhxoUrhZw07Uu433-R-0ISYtil8Iho_yLO1lT-YAWCy6AyzDaP4JTiaWWt_oL4uWkwGD0nh6S8mrBkwrrbT4-dOC9_zSqCh7M0Tj9jcBD-XtkhAWdxMvxzqx1MAPcsSWEZVXspmMHRajEEEk1iwhpT7wQXRmsszinU4&c=v_SXduq7-tepsJ4kQ79OVsfSSqIPyBcLQ8DyPHn3qdr6jR0v4IPuUw==&ch=aUw4OrhC0WnE_YHrlCqeb70FshA3OELY5h-R3hFlQWVFJDjq2HgnmQ==) Friend, in just 4 days, our April numbers will be finalized, and my report will be on its way to the president's desk.
I'm counting on you to make sure our numbers blow him out of the water.
I want him to be impressed, and encouraged by the support he has in the Lone Star State.
**[Make your 4X MATCHED donation before it's too late.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zwqgm0-KgY-QZ7EDxLVnnQS5Par6tsEChJNHfLS0BfjrNOn9ZlhP0l5Ma3bOQjoDtQJxW3dcQv5ZzGik6tXVl5E0gzTA9P8OxWvTlO_CkrOoZam4dSJqHGZrJtVUitXYYrZ-ZFLdcKxFApuo972M3XQZyBZKyx98awxTXYLRDyo_BcAPgHRq8pB9s2_DFyhxoUrhZw07Uu433-R-0ISYtil8Iho_yLO1lT-YAWCy6AyzDaP4JTiaWWt_oL4uWkwGD0nh6S8mrBkwrrbT4-dOC9_zSqCh7M0Tj9jcBD-XtkhAWdxMvxzqx1MAPcsSWEZVXspmMHRajEEEk1iwhpT7wfB5upDcpfFD&c=v_SXduq7-tepsJ4kQ79OVsfSSqIPyBcLQ8DyPHn3qdr6jR0v4IPuUw==&ch=aUw4OrhC0WnE_YHrlCqeb70FshA3OELY5h-R3hFlQWVFJDjq2HgnmQ==)**
Let's make it count, Friend!
-John Cornyn \--------Forwarded Message Below-------- Friend, With all that is going on these days, I was recently thinking that our president could use some good news.
And now, here we are, facing another End of Month deadline square in the face.
Now is the PERFECT opportunity to give him an update on just how motivated Texans are to defend our conservative values, I want to share our numbers this month with him.
...But I want to make sure he's REALLY impressed.
**[That's why I've asked a generous group of donors to step forward to sweeten the pot. **BUT** Our liberal opponent outraised us by nearly double.

We're being targeted, Friend.

As an immigrant, woman, and proud conservative, I know what it's like to be targeted by the Democrats. They spent millions against me in 2018 to keep me out of office and they're already organizing against us to do it again.

_Why_ _?_ We won the primary, coming ahead of our self-funded liberal opponent. But we can't get complacent. We need to keep fighting back with everything we've got.

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: More than just another goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
With just a couple days left of the month, I'm sure your inbox is being flooded with the usual "end-of-month" email solicitations.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Td9jinJ3hz-kdt5W7-3m_4h0oBQ-OQdd5PMSLywxcyo=/99i9FJSKdNpVdx4vC8k4Am4oPdmYd5NaedV6VwWYKGk=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.27_SPK_b1_all&amount=22)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hopes you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/Td9jinJ3hz-kdt5W7-3m_4h0oBQ-OQdd5PMSLywxcyo=/2IuUnYsdfkIeocN5j4bNCQDdZvOUSkK8qtuzJ4i4L_4=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *

Team -

With just a couple days left of the month, I'm sure your inbox is being flooded with the usual "end-of-month" email solicitations.

One thing I've noticed about these emails in my own inbox is that despite their urgent fundraising asks -- they rarely take the time to explain what these fundraising goals actually mean.

Speaking for my own campaign, here's what I can tell you about our "end-of-month deadline."

Between now and the end of April, our campaign will work to get as many donations as we can through the door so we can enter May with the budget and resources we'll need to fulfill the new month's agenda.

For us that will mean expanding our community outreach programs to better serve our district amidst the COVID-19 pandemic, building out our digital organizing program to keep our volunteers engaged at a responsible distance, and funding our traditional campaign efforts to help us flip this seat in November.

We know this is a tall order, but our campaign team is ready to take it on and never shied away from doing the hard and meaningful work. **Anything that you 're able to give to help us fulfill these goals would make a huge difference.**

Donate here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Td9jinJ3hz-kdt5W7-3m_4h0oBQ-OQdd5PMSLywxcyo=/99i9FJSKdNpVdx4vC8k4Am4oPdmYd5NaedV6VwWYKGk=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.27_SPK_b1_all&amount=22)

Thanks for being on our team,
Sri
---
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Td9jinJ3hz-kdt5W7-3m_4h0oBQ-OQdd5PMSLywxcyo=/99i9FJSKdNpVdx4vC8k4Am4oPdmYd5NaedV6VwWYKGk=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.27_SPK_b1_all&amount=22)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/Td9jinJ3hz-kdt5W7-3m_4h0oBQ-OQdd5PMSLywxcyo=/99i9FJSKdNpVdx4vC8k4Am4oPdmYd5NaedV6VwWYKGk=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.27_SPK_b1_all&amount=22)
---
* * *
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at [sri2020.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Td9jinJ3hz-kdt5W7-3m_4h0oBQ-OQdd5PMSLywxcyo=/Mu9V4pKueMWgjuYyNcZbPciG8vLKqWvnHe9DFPp6w74=)
| Paid for by Sri for Congress
---
SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898

If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/Td9jinJ3hz-kdt5W7-3m_4h0oBQ-OQdd5PMSLywxcyo=/RRvLRysEUWLYTAeWxOd9l9i777Kiuze0sYmEQp4f32c=).

name: Tina Smith
subject: question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
There is so much money in politics. I’m talking about the wealthy mega-donors dumping millions into our elections to save the GOP majority. The super PACs in Mitch McConnell’s back pocket flooding millions more into key Senate races. And, of course, there’s always the shady special interests who want a piece of this election. But here’s a question I get asked a lot: **Who powers _our_ campaign?** The answer is easy — it’s folks like you! People like Patricia in Apple Valley, Scott in Minneapolis, Shannon in Stillwater, Terry in Edina, and Kathie in Woodbury who have all given in just the past few days. I could go on and on about the countless Minnesotans who have supported our campaign by chipping in a few hard-earned dollars at a time. These folks contribute because they believe in what we’re fighting for. We’re able to take on the super PACs, special interests, and wealthy right-wing donors because of Patricia, Scott, Shannon, Terry, Kathie, and so many others. That’s something I’m very proud of. But we’re only going to see more of these shadowy players and dark money organizations target us in the months ahead, which means we’re going to need even more grassroots donors like you to step up. **If it makes sense for you financially, can I count on you to add a donation before our end-of-month deadline to show these guys the power of our grassroots movement? clean_body: | There is so much money in politics. I’m talking about the wealthy mega-donors dumping millions into our elections to save the GOP majority. The super PACs in Mitch McConnell’s back pocket flooding millions more into key Senate races. And, of course, there’s always the shady special interests who want a piece of this election. But here’s a question I get asked a lot: Who powers our campaign? The answer is easy — it’s folks like you! People like Patricia in Apple Valley, Scott in Minneapolis, Shannon in Stillwater, Terry in Edina, and Kathie in Woodbury who have all given in just the past few days. I could go on and on about the countless Minnesotans who have supported our campaign by chipping in a few hard-earned dollars at a time. These folks contribute because they believe in what we’re fighting for. We’re able to take on the super PACs, special interests, and wealthy right-wing donors because of Patricia, Scott, Shannon, Terry, Kathie, and so many others. That’s something I’m very proud of. But we’re only going to see more of these shadowy players and dark money organizations target us in the months ahead, which means we’re going to need even more grassroots donors like you to step up. If it makes sense for you financially, can I count on you to add a donation before our end-of-month deadline to show these guys the power of our grassroots movement? Chip in $10 or our average contribution this month of $18.79: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This is a must-win race for Democrats to take the majority in the Senate. With every dollar you give, you’re showing we have what it takes to win with the power of grassroots fundraising and campaigning. That’s something I can’t thank you enough for. — Tina P.S. These are challenging times, so if you’d like to receive fewer emails during this public health emergency,_ Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Latest Round of Coronavirus Relief Shows Hardworking Americans Not Forgotten
body:
"President Trump signed the fourth round of coronavirus response legislation Friday—a $484 billion relief bill that will help American..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f29d64e1f7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Latest Round of Coronavirus Relief Shows Hardworking Americans Not Forgotten**

“President Trump signed the fourth round of coronavirus response legislation Friday—a $484 billion relief bill that will help American small businesses and hospitals, as well as expand coronavirus testing so Americans can get back to work as soon as possible,” former CKE Restaurants CEO Andy Puzder writes in Fox News.

“The lion’s share of the funding – $310 billion – will go directly to the Small Business Administration’s Paycheck Protection Program (PPP), a massively popular program that has already disbursed $350 billion to businesses all over the country,” Puzder says.

“Millions of Americans have been holding their metaphorical breath as House Democrats delayed the latest round of relief with partisan demands for unrelated provisions such as mandating racial and gender quotas for businesses.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f70151831&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “There’s no question that Beijing’s early cover-up of its coronavirus crisis led to the deaths of thousands of people around the world. And it’s still lying, blatantly. After weeks of pressure, it finally upped its official count of coronavirus deaths in Wuhan, where the pandemic started, from 2,579 to 3,869—that is, exactly 50 percent. Nothing suspicious there,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2c1f07e68b&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “The Food and Drug Administration has ongoing clinical trials for 72 drugs to treat COVID-19, therapeutics that aren’t a cure, but which will treat the symptoms of the disease, FDA Commissioner Dr. Stephen Hahn announced Friday,” Fred Lucas reports for [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=569c4b2552&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump’s 60-day immigration pause “is a genuine ‘no-brainer’ that should be supported by every American concerned about the grievous harm the coronavirus has caused to public health and the economic health of our country,” National Border Patrol Council President Brandon Judd writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6c0cb241fd&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af1891fc7e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9f786f3e1f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4a66953b33)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: MondaireforCongress.com
subject: The only one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Our race is crowded. There will be 8 people on the ballot in June. But when you look at all the candidates, it is clear Mondaire is the only one calling for the big, bold solutions necessary to take on the crises we face. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6wA/ni0YAA/t.31a/ZphO41JnSmKazJm5-eyGOg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIGr8qjtyxO1guj9PhGgIfVUcnj-2FxYHLxUE4xigs4qXzsEIqJaqkLgG7vmmlpA0x64QpPGm3uVu-2BJXr6TRzj-2BNnVLmTLQaP4540YT7TLMUo6oiesDAwr0nyUEZ-2Bzp9pYDvViVxUU5tnGqFKA161NZZ4ZyNQ20cpPIxp04ZkBONeE5TL-2FtFp6Hc9TbOW8OEYFZKRz-2F-2BxxcBtIfH1OJxrCj7YS6ov24o09gbAJkMVPstuYYyTzzFSugHMs-2Br6Im8iaZU-3D/EMkV) Friend, **** **** **** Our race is crowded. There will be 8 people on the ballot in June. But when you look at all the candidates, it is clear Mondaire is the **_only one_** calling for the big, bold solutions necessary to take on the crises we face.
Just yesterday, Mondaire published an op-ed in Salon arguing that the only way we can save our democracy and guarantee a woman’s right to choose is to expand the Supreme Court.
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6wA/ni0YAA/t.31a/ZphO41JnSmKazJm5-eyGOg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIGr8qjtyxO1guj9PhGgIfVUcnj-2FxYHLxUE4xigs4qXzkiEJxhfLOVup8BnxY79AcOjGAIEnQEOiD5v-2BeexX4yl-2FrgfVVGNEkz5Nh50CmBUmp2ZN1nUKFiqM4QOvjfugmrS0TaUHBbpS2HBkYwpC3BM08BmRReKrYm7WcENHvA84t1iUjTMP3Hz96KTxjZQLQVpi2k4uInSzoIvtVMdx84brcsBNgEUmxs8TKyNtmqmGHbUr8YHLCGemYp530mJolQ-3D/hoU2)
He’s also the only candidate in the race who has centered his campaign around a Green New Deal and believes that health care should be guaranteed to every single American regardless of income or employment status. It’s clear that Mondaire stands out in this crowded field, but we need to get that message to voters. **_[Can you make a contribution right now to help us?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6wA/ni0YAA/t.31a/ZphO41JnSmKazJm5-eyGOg/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIGr8qjtyxO1guj9PhGgIfVUcnj-2FxYHLxUE4xigs4qXzqpX7iArklv-2FzHFhZX54liRG22B3HddlbS-2FxJFBAFlzUIi6VnwUqbtVM8U9nfmnX1LlCwtlS30ZLP0AQaGUgbQTHeox2AFjYcNdrxReQVda-2F4-2FpyuBY9dA-2BVv3y-2BjgRtuDc7aLldImMzj57mZyPg12K1Mfl-2FLtfH20fDYQHQyh1UiXArFPADHfA23FDcKgARlODEepnGu-2BkJI3O0zdujRcs-3D/PYzj)_**
We’re putting together our campaign ads to get that message out, but we’re not sure if we’ll have the resources we need to reach everyone. Right now, there are four days left in the month and we’re **$8,720 away from our monthly fundraising goal**. That goal isn’t just a random number -- it’s directly tied to the amount of TV & digital ads, mailers, texts, and calls we need to make in order to win. **_[Will you make a donation today so we can hit that goal?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6wA/ni0YAA/t.31a/ZphO41JnSmKazJm5-eyGOg/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIGr8qjtyxO1guj9PhGgIfVUcnj-2FxYHLxUE4xigs4qXzrtfXCYm-2BSj0L637N4wieIiCZ2dYPq1JpkOmVwWDckoIdinfpduX4wT8AUUtgoyIGTGAjhvweR1iWAmjBqzCHXiQ-2FN-2B3vaThYmsknw2k1IalTzQi2p-2Bvy6PaEb9CUj0Xl2vpMCYbXtuDcf0t-2BWRKv9T7ysFp-2FBth4YpUKx9K2p70zyxm7a-2BiCnU9q-2BZQYg1GN1hljp0caUj7zBbWXcdx2K4-3D/b5Z0)_**

clean_body: Our race is crowded. There will be 8 people on the ballot in June. But when you look at all the candidates, it is clear Mondaire is the only one calling for the big, bold solutions necessary to take on the crises we face. | | | Friend, ** Our race is crowded. There will be 8 people on the ballot in June. But when you look at all the candidates, it is clear Mondaire is the only one calling for the big, bold solutions necessary to take on the crises we face. Just yesterday, Mondaire published an op-ed in Salon arguing that the only way we can save our democracy and guarantee a woman’s right to choose is to expand the Supreme Court. He’s also the only candidate in the race who has centered his campaign around a Green New Deal and believes that health care should be guaranteed to every single American regardless of income or employment status. It’s clear that Mondaire stands out in this crowded field, but we need to get that message to voters. We’re putting together our campaign ads to get that message out, but we’re not sure if we’ll have the resources we need to reach everyone. Right now, there are four days left in the month and we’re $8,720 away from our monthly fundraising goal. That goal isn’t just a random number -- it’s directly tied to the amount of TV & digital ads, mailers, texts, and calls we need to make in order to win. ** Team Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/W1SfIJyYk9whUYVeD19E6su7oYIm6ejyYBfXXI_JR0o=/g4_EgMm8jUfg6Sln4rpxVE8-71PXCV3--EIhxgtMzkU=?refcode=200427-email) Peter, At EMILY's List, we work to raise money for pro-choice Democratic women candidates because we know just how far our opponents will go to defeat them and how deep the pockets of right-wing PACs are. **[That's why I'm emailing you -- we need Rita Hart to win in IA-02 to stop extreme right-wing forces from turning this district red and electing someone who would roll back Obamacare, Social Security, and more. Will you donate $25 to help Rita WIN? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/W1SfIJyYk9whUYVeD19E6su7oYIm6ejyYBfXXI_JR0o=/i0KXeiX_nuICvoUp5arOPNiBkHJ_1EJVKVpm_XlITCk=?refcode=200427-email&amount=25)** [DONATE TO PROTECT THIS SEAT](https://act.myngp.com/el/W1SfIJyYk9whUYVeD19E6su7oYIm6ejyYBfXXI_JR0o=/g4_EgMm8jUfg6Sln4rpxVE8-71PXCV3--EIhxgtMzkU=?refcode=200427-email) Rita Hart is an incredibly effective legislator and has worked as both a teacher and a farmer. She understands the community, and she's on a mission to listen to every voice in the district and take those stories with her to Washington. **But Rita 's race is projected as a complete toss-up**, which means we need to work overtime to elect her. Donald Trump won this district in 2016, so she needs the resources to reach out to every single voter in IA-02. **[That's why we need your help. Donate $30 or even just $10 today so we can stop far-right forces from turning this seat red.](https://act.myngp.com/el/W1SfIJyYk9whUYVeD19E6su7oYIm6ejyYBfXXI_JR0o=/i0KXeiX_nuICvoUp5arOPNiBkHJ_1EJVKVpm_XlITCk=?refcode=200427-email)** Thanks for being on Rita's team, Stephanie Schriock

I was able to read through a number of the personal messages you all sent me, and it served as yet another reminder of why I decided to get in this race. Right now, there are too many folks in our district -- and our country -- who aren't getting ahead, or worse, struggling to stay afloat.
**It may have been my birthday, but we are still reaching out to voters and ensuring we have the resources to win this critical election. In fact, we 're still facing a $10,000 fundraising gap on our April goal.**
[**So if you want to help make my birthday EXTRA special, please add a donation to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal:**](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b4c8/388db0e9/8d7b8bc/609ba58f/3333359132/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9hcHIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDQyN19CRGF5VFlfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_apr?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200427_BDayTY_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+So+if+you+want+to+help+make+my+birthday+&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200427_BDayTY_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200427_BDayTY_U1_X1")

We need a leader for Central New York in Congress. I will be that strong leader, and others agree!
**Since receiving key endorsement from VoteVets and the Gun Sense Candidate distinction from Moms Demand Action, our campaign is positioning itself to flip one of the last GOP-held districts that HIllary Clinton won in 2016.**
As momentum for our grassroots campaign grows, so do the incoming Republican attacks. **That 's why your financial support is more important than ever before. [So please, add a donation and let's reach our April fundraising goal!](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b4c8/388db0e9/8d7b8bc/609ba588/3333359132/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9hcHIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDQyN19CRGF5VFlfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_apr?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200427_BDayTY_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=10+-+So+please+add+a+donation+and+letrsquos+r&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200427_BDayTY_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200427_BDayTY_U1_X1")**
Thanks again for the birthday wishes,
Francis

name: Dean Browning
subject: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller: Chapter One
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
You may or may not know that my Republican challenger, Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller, has used her big-money donors to create a website with gutter style, fabricated personal attacks on me. Lisa Scheller has gone to desperate measures, calling in back up from the Washington Swamp itself.
She handsomely paid Washington Insiders to smear me and my campaign in a desperate attempt to cover up her own agenda. Truthfully, this does not surprise me.
I am actually honored that she feels so threatened by my campaign that she would dump tons of money into a ridiculous and childish website. THIS SHOWS THAT WE ARE WINNING THIS ELECTION!! In response to Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller's feeble attempt to derail my campaign, I am launching a series: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller. Over the course of the next two weeks, I will expose her liberal agenda, her hypocrisy, and her exploitation of public office to make money for herself, and her company that received millions of dollars from the Obama Administration and from China. , we have Liberal Lying Lisa Scheller on her heels, and I need your help to win this Primary Election!
Will you help support the cause and chip in $50, $25, or even just $10 to my campaign?
---

| For Freedom,

| Dean Browning Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07

Don't miss Chapter Two of The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller this Wednesday!

name: Team Hunt
subject: Masks Available!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

In case you haven't heard, as of today, Harris County is requiring all
residents over the age of 10 to wear a mask in public.

To make sure that everyone who needs a mask has access to one, our volunteers
have already started sewing masks.

We would be more than happy to drop one off to you!

If you need a mask or assistance on anything else related to the virus,
please contact our campaign by replying to this email or calling us at
713-244-6369.

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Team Michelle
subject: We need to keep up our momentum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

This campaign is really picking up momentum! Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we had an incredible first quarter of this campaign. We not only outraised the incumbent, but the entire GOP field combined.

**It's clear: Kansans are ready for a different kind of leader.**

This grassroots campaign has a real shot at electing Michelle De La Isla to fight for Kansans. That means our opponents are going to do everything they can to hold onto this seat, and we need to be prepared to fight back.

**[We've set a goal of raising $20,000 before our end-of-month deadline to help keep up our momentum and prepare for any attacks that come our way. | Friends, Some great news to brighten up this rainy Monday morning! clean_body: Will you help protect this South Jersey today? If so, then we need your help to reach our critical April fundraising deadline. Friend, This upcoming deadline is our most critical one yet! While we continue to gain momentum each day and even surpassed our Radical Left opponents last quarter -- == Earlier this month, Nancy Pelosi announced that her House Majority PAC would dump millions of dollars into South Jersey earmarked to defeat Jeff Van Drew in November. And it's clear why: ==. Jeff Van Drew never abandoned South Jersey. He has always stood for fiscal responsibility, protecting our 2nd amendment rights, and the needs of this district first. When Nancy Pelosi ordered Jeff to walk away from his principles and support the Radical Left in impeaching President Trump on false claims, Jeff had had enough. Jeff joined our Republican Party and was immediately endorsed by President Trump in the Oval Office. President Trump then came to Wildwood where he openly praised Jeff for sticking to his guns. Now, the President is calling on each one of us to stand together to back Jeff and his own campaign's efforts to defend South Jersey in November. == Friend, our team is waiting on your response! == If so, then we need your help to reach our critical April fundraising deadline. == == == == == == == Thank you, Ron Filan, Campaign Manager Team Van Drew == Paid for by Van Drew for Congress. PO BOX 671 CAPE MAY COURT HOUSE, NJ 08210 == | | Van Drew for Congress | PO BOX 671, CAPE MAY COURT HOUSE, NJ 08210 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

subject: We're still not where we need to be

body:
We want to thank you for your incredible support and for continuing to help Greg in the fight to protect our Montana way of life.
Friend,
Yesterday, we told you that we needed our supporters to step up in order to prevent our campaign from falling short in campaign funds for the month, and Friend, people stepped up in a HUGE way!
We want to thank you for your incredible support and for continuing to help Greg in the fight to protect our Montana way of life.
**However, despite the major support we received yesterday, we 're still not where we need to be**.

Friend, Yesterday, we told you that we needed our supporters to step up in order to prevent our campaign from falling short in campaign funds for the month, and Friend, people stepped up in a HUGE way! We want to thank you for your incredible support and for continuing to help Greg in the fight to protect our Montana way of life. However, despite the major support we received yesterday, we 're still not where we need to be. ==. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: No one could have predicted we’d end up running a campaign like this one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
When we launched this campaign for Senate, no one could have predicted we would end up running a campaign like this. One that’s entirely online, without any in-person campaign events. I certainly do miss being outside and meeting folks all over our beautiful state. Talking to folks over Zoom isn’t quite the same as meeting voters to talk about efforts to protect our public lands or sharing a cold beer while we discuss creating jobs. But I have also been blown away by how this community has stepped up in the last few weeks. **One thing about this campaign that hasn’t changed, however, is the amount of money Mitch McConnell’s right-wing donor network is willing to spend to protect his Senate majority and defeat us.** McConnell’s donors have already booked over $100 million worth of ads targeting Democrats like me. And you better believe there’s more coming down the pike. **With our in-person fundraising events on hold for the foreseeable future, we’re going to need a big surge of grassroots contributions to respond. Can you pitch in $10 or more right now to help us fight back and flip this seat blue?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17283305/189264435/544450192?refcode=jwh-em-200427-imagine&express_lane=true&amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjIyOTBjOC1jNDg4LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nU_46qWvqrlGQ0JihPYvkpWmOQ-Hni56bNRhMrXalpA=)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17283371/189266617/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTA4YjJlNi1jNTg4LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpY6ndqA8fT9kZ0T_XJxmpf_SfTF5csoEdAKcF9VUeY=&emci=7c25375c-b488-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=be08b2e6-c588-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Hi Team, In case you missed it, last week we launched the first event of our new web series: _In Good Company_ , a series of virtual events with some of the most prominent players in politics! It was great to hear from so many members of our community and an honor to have Commissioner Nikki Fried join us to launch the series. Thank you to everyone who submitted questions and helped make the event such a success. In this time of uncertainty and isolation, our connection to this community is more meaningful than ever. Now, we’re fired up to announce and welcome our next guest -- **Chairwoman of the Florida Democratic Party, Terrie Rizzo**. Chair Rizzo has been on the front lines fighting for Democrats in this state -- driving voter engagement, building a massive, statewide turnout operation, and helping to secure Democratic victories up and down the ballot! We’re so excited about our upcoming event and our _In Good Company_ webinar series that we want to offer all our supporters the opportunity to join. [**Click here and make a donation of $20.20 and you’ll automatically get registered to join us tomorrow for our webinar with Florida Democratic Party Chair Terrie Rizzo.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17283373/189266619/-756790116?refcode=E2465-20200427-WebinarRizzo-SL&amount=20.20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTA4YjJlNi1jNTg4LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpY6ndqA8fT9kZ0T_XJxmpf_SfTF5csoEdAKcF9VUeY=) Not only will your donation support our critical _End-of -Month fundraising deadline_ , but you’ll also have the opportunity to check out our new series, which features some of the most knowledgeable and influential people in politics. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17283375/189266621/-756790116?refcode=E2465-20200427-WebinarRizzo-SB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTA4YjJlNi1jNTg4LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpY6ndqA8fT9kZ0T_XJxmpf_SfTF5csoEdAKcF9VUeY=)
---
Even though we can’t be out there together knocking on doors and organizing around kitchen tables, we can still be virtually together in our living rooms.
[**Make sure to check out or register for all of the upcoming events in the series. You can see a full list of our scheduled and upcoming events by clicking here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17283376/189266623/121337317?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTA4YjJlNi1jNTg4LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpY6ndqA8fT9kZ0T_XJxmpf_SfTF5csoEdAKcF9VUeY=&emci=7c25375c-b488-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=be08b2e6-c588-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)

The Events Team at Margaret Good for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Kendra Horn: Too Radical for Oklahoma
body:
Horn's views out of step with voters | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8f22e4209789/calling-all-patriots-12243426?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=45af8b049b&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=0c6152c1fa&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [SAY NO TO LIBERAL DEMOCRAT KENDRA HORN: DONATE TODAY](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=16ba6978b9&e=795c6d9796 "SAY NO TO LIBERAL DEMOCRAT KENDRA HORN: DONATE TODAY")
---
| Peter,
This is a piece that was recently published in a left-wing publication and I couldn't help but share.
---
| [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=6858389c80&e=795c6d9796)
---
| **We couldn't agree more.**

Here in Oklahoma, we pride ourselves on being among the most conservative states in the country.

It's why we elected Donald Trump by a 36-point margin in 2016.

It's why we're going to re-elect him in 2020.

And it's why Kendra Horn has been rated the #1 most vulnerable incumbent in the House of Representatives.

**I've got news for Kendra Horn: we're sending her home in November.**

She's portrayed herself as a "moderate" Democrat, but make no mistake: Kendra Horn has been nothing short of a rubber stamp vote for Nancy Pelosi and her extremist liberal agenda in Congress; an agenda that consists of radical social policies, open borders, ObamaCare, reckless spending and higher taxes.

Liberal money has poured in from every corner of the country to try and keep her in this seat. She's got the backing of the entire national Democratic Party as well as Planned Parenthood, and they're going to spend millions to try and influence your vote.

If we're going to fight back against this big money, we're going to need your support. [Would you donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even more to help us flip this seat back to red?](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=e44f576f4c&e=795c6d9796)

We've got to take back the House in November, and it starts right here in Oklahoma. The less votes that Nancy Pelosi has in Washington, the better our country will be.

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=d3855ee59e&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi

[P.S. Help us send Kendra Horn home in November! Would you consider a donation of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more? Every dollar goes to fighting the establishment and bringing a fresh, conservative voice to Washington.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=32c6beb2c5&e=795c6d9796)
---

subject: **Critical Campaign Needs**
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc
body:
Stand with Dr. Chuck... we have JUST WEEKS to close strong and win! Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/fb6b0f598fce7159/facde949480c8400c3d6b838967d376c/33363) Fellow Hoosier, Dr. Chuck and I want to say THANK YOU to everyone who requested one of his yard signs. _It’s great to see so many supporters showing their neighbors where they stand!_ This is truly an election season unlike any other in our lifetime. Meet-and-greet events and door-knocking are off the table... but we still need to reach voters. That’s why I’m writing today. **We’re launching a vital end-of-month fundraising drive, to gather the resources we need to close strong in this primary race and WIN on June 2nd.** You can see the direct impact your support will make below.
